data.name: 新～情色法師
data.detailed_description:
在新群馬市，速食業巨頭「手淫麥當當」透過排擠所有競爭對手，牢牢掌控了整座城市及其居民的生活。女督察珍妮正在調查一起謀殺案時，邀請了私家偵探鈴香協助。然而，當「手淫麥當當」的菜單調整引發全城暴亂時，事情迅速失控，許多貧困居民因無法負擔食物而陷入困境。

鈴香在全城接手各種案件，有些看似微不足道，例如尋找走失的貓，但另一些則揭露了這座腐敗城市深處的黑暗。面對充滿道德墮落與危險的城市，鈴香必須謹慎行事。每一個決定都可能將她帶向真相，或是更深的黑暗深淵。

在這座城市中探索，收集資訊、物品和補給，逐步向頂樓進發，打倒壓迫城市的公司。你需要小心穿越新群馬的陰暗面，因為各種遭遇在等著你。而不僅僅是公司僱用的暴徒，你還得留意其他潛在的威脅！不但如此，新群馬市還潛伏著各種想要得到鈴香的混混！

沉浸在經典的回合製RPG戰鬥中，你不僅需要帶來強大的力量，還需要提前準備，並在戰鬥中靈活應變，才能希望獲得勝利。

製作

憑藉伊織在修理和建造方面的技能，你將能夠製作各種物品，幫助你應對新群馬後街上常見的那些有些不堪的遭遇。

角色和事件的多樣性

鈴香會遇到很多淫穢的情況，例如從像乳牛一樣被擠、到在公共場合被人抓著屁股抽插，新群馬的惡棍們會用各種創意的方式玩弄鈴香！

雖然鈴香在遊戲中可能會遇到許多淫蕩的遭遇，但她並不孤單！在《新～情色法師》中有眾多的女孩，每個女孩都有自己的事件和性感邂逅，這些事件和邂逅會隨著你在整個故事中的選擇而展開。雙性人、當眾羞辱屬性和穿皮衣的女人，這些都是在本作值得期待的！

data.short_description: 與偵探鈴香一同展開調查，她追蹤著一場陰謀與謀殺的線索，最終直指新群馬市腐敗的核心。她能否揭開真相，還是會一頭撞上遠超預期的危險，被這座城市的黑暗角落吞噬？
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: New Eromancer
data.detailed_description:
In Neo Gunma, the mega fast-food corporation, Wank Wanknald, has gained a stranglehold on the city and its people by driving out all other available competition. Inspector Jenny is on a murder case when she enlists the help of the private detective Suzuka to aid in her investigation, but things quickly take a turn for the worse when riots break out across the city due to a change in their menu, leaving many of the poorer citizens of the city unable to afford anything to eat anymore.

Explore the city to gather information, items, and supplies as you work your way up to the top and take down the corporation oppressing the city. You’ll need to be careful as you traverse the seedy underside of Neo Gunma. It’s not just the corporation’s goons that you’ll have to keep an eye out for! Neo Gunma is home to all sorts of lecherous fiends eyeing out Suzuka’s killer body, just waiting for the opportunity to spend some time with her!

Take part in classic turn-based RPG combat where you’ll need to not only bring brute force to the table, but prepare in advance and adapt on the fly if you hope to come out on top.

Crafting

With Iori’s skills in tinkering and building, you will be able to craft various items to help you resolve the rather seedy encounters that are all too common in the backstreets of Neo Gunma.

Variety Of Characters And Events

Suzuka will find herself in many obscene circumstances, from being milked like a cow, to having sex in public, there are no shortages of lewd interactions!

And while Suzuka may face many lewd encounters throughout the game, she is far from alone! New Eromancer features a wide cast of girls, each with their own events and sexy encounters which unfold and are influenced by your choices throughout the story. Futas, public humiliation, and women in leather, there’s lots to look forward to!

data.short_description: Fight, craft, and explore the streets as Detective Suzuka battles the corrupt Wank Wanknald. This lewd RPG combines strategic combat, spicy encounters, and a gripping story where your choices shape intense battles and the fates of a hot cast of characters.
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
